horse racing prediction models dynamic o.title: A SHAP-Based Horse Racing Prediction Model with Variable Contribution Analysis in Gamification Environments
Aero-Engine RUL Prediction Based on SE-SFResNet Enhanced by improved Tianji’s Horse Racing Optimization
horse racing prediction models dynamic o.abstract: Accurate data-driven prediction of aero-engine Remaining Useful Life (RUL) inherently involves a trade-off between prediction accuracy and computational complexity. This paper proposes a novel hybrid Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) integrated with SF-Residual Neural Network (SE-SFResNet) framework, with hyperparameters systematically optimized through the Tianji’s Horse Racing Optimization improverd by Thinking Innovation Strategy (TIS-THRO). The framework embeds Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) modules within SFResNet blocks to dynamically recalibrate channel features, which enhance both feature representation and computational efficiency. The TIS-THRO algorithm innovatively combines Thinking Innovation Strategy (TIS) with THRO, avoiding local optima through successful individual-guided global exploration to determine optimal network configurations. The method is verified by NASA’s Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System Simulation (C-MPASS) dataset. The results show that compared with the conventional ResNet and CNN-BiLSTM methods, the novel method has advantages in both RUL prediction effect and model complexity.
